overview: Spencer Carrera XL Tec MAX is a compact and lightweight self-loading stretcher for transport of patients. It can be used for rescue operations on road and sanitary vehicles. The legs fold independently operating the specific commands and open automatically when unloading. This particular model is characterized by a greater loading capacity if compared with a Carrera XL Tec standard.
features: Patient board with Trendelenburg antishock position
2 fixed wheels and 2 pivoting with large diameter to make movement easier
